programme.title: My Candidate
programme.desc: An image consultant is hired to help out the campaign of a reluctant senatorial candidate.

programme.title: Clarita
programme.desc: After learning that a group of doctors were killed by super natural forces, father’s Salvador (Ricky Davao) and Benedicto (Arron Villaflor) will have their faith tested when they are tasked to perform an exorcism on a possessed woman named Clarita (Jodi Sta. Maria). Meanwhile, a photojournalist investigates the truth about Clarita’s possession and helps the two priests perform the exorcism. In their journey to help Clarita, they will encounter demonic obstacles that will prevent them from performing the exorcism. Will Clarita’s soul be saved or will the evil in her take over?

programme.title: That Thing Called Tadhana
programme.desc: A woman struggling to meet airline baggage requirements meets a man who comes to her aid. They form a friendship that helps them mend each other's hearts.

programme.title: Lucid
programme.desc: A lucid dreamer who dreams about the exact opposite of her life meets a mysterious man in one of her dreams.

programme.title: Tatlong Taong Walang Diyos
programme.desc: A woman fell in love with a Japanese soldier, during the Japanese Occupation in the Philippines. The whole town turned against her.

programme.title: Ang Pagsanib kay Leah Dela Cruz
programme.desc: A lady cop who moves into a small town gets drawn to a case that involves a girl that's possessed by an evil spirit.

programme.title: Ulan
programme.desc: In this coming-of-age-film about self-love, Maya is a girl who has always held a pessimistic view of the rain, reminding her of failed love and other depressing things. Will the rain ever stop her in her journey to overcome past heartaches?

programme.title: Till I Met You
programme.desc: Three friends — Iris, a girl; Basti, a boy; and Ali, a closeted homosexual — eventually fall in love with each other and find themselves in an unusual love triangle.

programme.title: Video City: Be Kind, Please Rewind
programme.desc: An uninspired filmmaker accidentally time travels back to the 90s at a Video City store, where he meets the woman who will change his life.

programme.title: Moron 5 and The Crying Lady
programme.desc: Five friends with below average intelligence earn the wrath of a wealthy bride-to-be. For this, they are framed for murder. The five have to escape from prison and try to clear their names on the outside.

programme.title: Wapakman
programme.desc: A ordinary man miraculously survives what should have been a fatal accident, and emerges with superpowers. He starts using these powers to help other people, in the process becoming a better father to his children. But when his wife comes to take his children away, he finds that his powers do little to change things.\r\n.
